name: Lemon-Chive Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Chives, finely snipped OR green onion tops
1 tbsp Basil, snipped OR 1 tbsp Dried basil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Let the mixture stand for 30-60 minutes to allow flavors to blend.
3. Store refrigerated, up to 2 weeks. Bring back to room temperature before using.
